phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'on peut visiter l'Opéra sans spectacle ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess kohn puh vee-zee-TAY loh-pay-RAH sahn spek-TAHKL
phrases.cultural_note: Self-guided visits are available daily (except during matinee performances). You'll see the grand staircase, auditorium, and the stunning Grand Foyer.

responses.english: Yes, self-guided visits are open every day except during matinees.
responses.phonetic: wee, lay vee-ZEET LEE-bruh sohn too-VEHR too lay zhoor sohf ahn mah-tee-NAY
responses.local: Oui, les visites libres sont ouvertes tous les jours sauf en matinée.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how much a self-guided visit costs
phrases.cultural_note: Self-guided visits let you explore the grand staircase, auditorium, and foyer at your own pace.

responses.english: It is fifteen euros for adults.
responses.phonetic: seh kanz uh-ROH poor layz ah-DOOLT
responses.local: C'est quinze euros pour les adultes.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the entrance for self-guided visits is
phrases.text_local: Où est l'entrée pour la visite libre ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh lan-TRAY poor lah vee-ZEET LEE-bruh
phrases.cultural_note: The self-guided visit entrance is separate from the performance entrance. Look for signs near the corner of the building.

responses.english: The entrance is on the left side of the building.
responses.phonetic: lan-TRAY eh soor luh koh-TAY gohsh doo bah-tee-MAHN
responses.local: L'entrée est sur le côté gauche du bâtiment.

phrases.text_local: Qu'est-ce qui se joue ce soir ?
phrases.pronunciation: kess kee suh ZHOO suh SWAHR
phrases.cultural_note: The Opéra Garnier hosts ballet and smaller operas. Larger operas are at Opéra Bastille. Last-minute tickets are sometimes available at the box office.

responses.english: The schedule is posted at the entrance and on the website.
responses.phonetic: layz oh-REHR sohn tah-fee-SHAY ah lan-TRAY ay soor luh seet
responses.local: Les horaires sont affichés à l'entrée et sur le site.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the dress code for performances
phrases.text_local: Il y a un code vestimentaire pour le spectacle ?
phrases.pronunciation: eel ee ah uhn KOHD ves-tee-mahn-TEHR poor luh spek-TAHKL
phrases.cultural_note: There's no strict dress code, but Parisians dress elegantly for the opera. Smart casual is the minimum. Jeans and sneakers are technically allowed but you'll stand out.

responses.english: No strict dress code, but elegant attire is recommended.
responses.phonetic: pah duh kohd streekt, meh oon tuh-NOO ay-lay-GAHNT eh ruh-koh-mahn-DAY
responses.local: Pas de code strict, mais une tenue élégante est recommandée.
